case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS DURANT ERNEST J DBA PRINT KING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DURANT ERNEST J DBA PRINT KING

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,277.61 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT DURANT ERNEST J DBA PRINT KING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
